profile.name: Arash
profile.background_note: ASSET, NOT A CONSTRAINT — fully willing to leave GNSS/INS behind and master entirely new domains for the right opportunity.
profile.goal: Capture a piece of the US humanoid robotics market as an ENTREPRENEUR — $1M+/year within 12-24 months by adding value to existing humanoid/robotics businesses. NOT seeking employment.

constraints.team: Solo founder — exactly ONE person, no employees
constraints.capital: Small grant-scale funds (five figures), no VC raised
constraints.opportunity_selection_rule: Rank purely by market opportunity. NEVER filter by proximity to current skills.

few_shot_good_opportunities.description: Provide specialized tactile sensor calibration software for bimanual manipulation startups.
few_shot_good_opportunities.reason: Solves a painful bottleneck for humanoid startups, requires low capital, can be sold B2B via API/licenses, and fits a solo founder.

few_shot_good_opportunities.description: Build an automated synthetic data generation pipeline using Isaac Sim for teleoperation tasks.
few_shot_good_opportunities.reason: High demand for sim-to-real data; you can run compute overnight and sell the datasets or the generation service as a solo founder.

few_shot_bad_opportunities.description: Build a new foundation model for robotic manipulation.
few_shot_bad_opportunities.reason: Requires massive compute (VC funding) and a large team. Violates the solo founder constraint.

few_shot_bad_opportunities.description: Start a company to build a cheaper humanoid robot arm.
few_shot_bad_opportunities.reason: Hardware startups require high capital and full-time dedication. Violates the 20 hr/week and low capital constraints.
